name: ai-stock-analyst
description: AI Stock Analyst Agent - Root workspace

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null || true && echo 'Setup complete! Edit .env with your API keys then run: npm run dev'
